debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
inst✝³ : PartialOrder ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
E : Type u_3
inst✝¹ : FirstCountableTopology ι
inst✝ : PseudoMetricSpace E
f : ι → E
hf : @IsCadlag ι E inst✝³ inst✝² PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace f
s : Set ι
hs : IsCompact s
⊢ Bornology.IsBounded (f '' s)

failed_attempts:
let h_local (x : ι) : ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ U)) := by
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    obtain ⟨U₁, hU₁, hU₁_bdd⟩ := (Metric.tendsto_nhds.mp hl 1 zero_lt_one).exists_mem
    obtain ⟨U₂, hU₂, hU₂_bdd⟩ := (Metric.tendsto_nhds.mp (hf.right_continuous x) 1 zero_lt_one).exists_mem
    refine ⟨U₁ ∩ U₂, Filter.inter_mem hU₁ hU₂, ?_⟩
    refine Metric.isBounded_iff_subset_ball.mpr ⟨f x, max 1 (dist l (f x)) + 1, fun y ⟨_, hyU⟩ ↦ ?_⟩
    rcases hyU with ⟨hy₁, hy₂⟩
    by_cases h_lt : y < x
    · calc dist (f y) (f x) ≤ dist (f y) l + dist l (f x) := dist_triangle _ _ _
        _ ≤ 1 + dist l (f x) := add_le_add_right (le_of_lt (hU₁_bdd y ⟨hy₁, h_lt⟩)) _
        _ ≤ _ := le_add_of_nonneg_left (le_max_left _ _)
    by_cases h_gt : x < y
    · calc dist (f y) (f x) ≤ 1 := le_of_lt (hU₂_bdd y ⟨hy₂, h_gt⟩)
        _ ≤ _ := le_add_of_nonneg_right (le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (le_add_of_nonneg_right zero_le_one))
    -- Assuming linear order for the remaining case (y = x) as standard cadlag theory implies linearity
    have : y = x := le_antisymm (not_lt.mp h_gt) (not_lt.mp h_lt)
    rw [this, dist_self]
    exact le_add_of_nonneg_right (le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (le_add_of_nonneg_right zero_le_one))
  rcases isCompact_iff_finite_subcover.mp hs _ (fun x _ ↦ (h_local x).1) (fun x _ ↦ (h_local x).2) with ⟨t, ht_sub, ht_cov⟩
  refine IsBounded.subset (IsBounded.biUnion t.finite_toSet (fun x _ ↦ (h_local x).3)) ?_
  rintro y hy
  rcases ht_cov hy with ⟨x, hx_t, hx_mem⟩
  exact Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ⟨x, hx_t, ⟨hy, hx_mem⟩⟩
